summary: Live PR inventory shard reviewed in plan mode. No shared canonical was selected; each open PR remains independently classified. No close, merge, fix, or label mutation is planned because the job disables low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise_pr, and the hydrated evidence does not show a boring duplicate/superseded/abandoned close path.

actions.reason: Independent open contributor PR; not a duplicate, superseded PR, low-signal close candidate, or merge candidate under this plan-mode job.
Independent open first-time contributor PR with failing checks; no safe close-style action is supported by the hydrated artifact.
Independent open PR with useful focused code; it should remain open for maintainer review rather than be closed or merged by this plan-mode inventory job.
Independent open feature PR; no duplicate/superseded/low-signal closure basis exists, and merge/fix are out of scope.
Independent open bug-fix PR with useful code; preserve it for maintainer review rather than planning closure in this inventory shard.
